after_email_verification.intro: Thanks for verifying your email address for {productName}. We're thrilled to have you on board. You can now start using {productName}.
after_email_verification.preheader: Welcome to {productName}! Your email has been verified.
after_email_verification.security_notice: For security, this request was received from a {operating_system} device using {browser_name}. If you did not verify your account, please ignore this email or contact support if you have questions.
after_email_verification.subject: Welcome to {productName}! You're all set
after_email_verification.title: You're verified, {name}!
after_email_verification.trouble_hint: If you're having trouble with the button above, copy and paste the URL below into your web browser.

on_existing_user_sign_up.intro: Someone tried to create a {productName} account using your email address. If this was you, you can simply sign in instead. Your existing {productName} account remains safe and accessible.
on_existing_user_sign_up.preheader: If this wasn't you, your {productName} account is still safe.
on_existing_user_sign_up.security_notice: For security, this request was received from a {operating_system} device using {browser_name}. If you did not make this request, please ignore this email or contact support if you have questions.
on_existing_user_sign_up.subject: Sign-up attempt with your {productName} account
on_existing_user_sign_up.title: Heads up, {name}!
on_existing_user_sign_up.trouble_hint: If you're having trouble with the button above, copy and paste the URL below into your web browser.

on_password_reset.intro: Your {productName} password has been successfully reset. You can now sign in with your new password.
on_password_reset.security_notice: For security, this request was received from a {operating_system} device using {browser_name}. If you did not reset your password, please contact support immediately.
on_password_reset.subject: Your {productName} password has been reset
on_password_reset.title: Password changed, {name}!
on_password_reset.trouble_hint: If you're having trouble with the button above, copy and paste the URL below into your web browser.

send_reset_password.intro: You requested to reset your {productName} password. Click the button below to choose a new password. This link is valid for 1 hour.
send_reset_password.preheader: Reset your {productName} password. This link expires in 1 hour.
send_reset_password.security_notice: For security, this request was received from a {operating_system} device using {browser_name}. If you did not request a password reset, please ignore this email or contact support if you have questions.
send_reset_password.subject: Reset your {productName} password
send_reset_password.title: Reset your password, {name}!
send_reset_password.trouble_hint: If you're having trouble with the button above, copy and paste the URL below into your web browser.

send_verification_email.intro: Thanks for trying {productName}. We're thrilled to have you on board. To get started with {productName}, please confirm your account.
send_verification_email.preheader: Welcome to {productName}! Please confirm your email address.
send_verification_email.security_notice: For security, this request was received from a {operating_system} device using {browser_name}. If you did not sign up for an account, please ignore this email or contact support if you have questions.
send_verification_email.subject: Welcome to {productName}! Confirm your Email
send_verification_email.title: Welcome, {name}!
send_verification_email.trouble_hint: If you're having trouble with the button above, copy and paste the URL below into your web browser.
